title.en: Ye Tian took the Yuangu Order and urged the Yua...

content.en:
"The Yuangu Hall is open, and I have to go in too!"

Ye Tian took the Yuangu Order and urged the Yuangu Order.

The next moment.

The Yuan Gu Ling turned into a cloud of light and enveloped Ye Tian, teleporting Ye Tian into an unknown latitude space.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian only felt that the light flashed in front of him, and he had come to a silent starry sky.

And there are constantly some strong people around, there are human races, there are also alien races, there are god-level, true god-level, great god-level, galaxy-level, and even galaxy-level, cosmic god......

In short, there are many, many strong people who have appeared in this void.

Obviously, this person is all the powerhouses of all races who have entered here with the Yuangu Order.

"Ye Tian!"

Suddenly, a voice came.

Ye Tian knew that the owner of this voice was Kunwu Supreme, but Kunwu Supreme himself did not appear by Ye Tian's side, but used the method of sound transmission.

"Ye Tian, after entering the Yuangu Palace, we will be teleported to one area after another according to the cultivation, the place where our Supreme is going is different from the area that your god-level enters, it is not allowed to move here, and inside the Yuangu Palace, many areas are also not allowed to move, so there is no need to worry about others being unfavorable to you. But it is said that some assessments have a certain degree of danger, so do what you can!"

Kungo Supreme reminded.

Ye Tian nodded secretly, indicating that he understood.

That's when it happened.

Rumble!!!

An unimaginably vast temple was born out of the void and appeared in the distance.

This hall was even many times larger than the supreme hall of the human race, full of supreme majesty, and wisps of light shone on this side of the only space.

This hall is the Yuangu Palace!

Whew!!

A powerhouse flew towards the Yuangu Palace, and in the blink of an eye, many powerhouses entered, while Ye Tian, these god-level powerhouses were relatively slow, so they finally flew into the Yuangu Palace.

As soon as he entered the Yuangu Palace, Ye Tian was teleported into a huge hall.

In this hall, Ye Tian saw many god-level powerhouses, basically all of them were of different races, as for the human race, there were only three god-level human races, so it can be seen that this time only three god-level human races came to the Yuangu Palace.

Whew!!

The other two god-level human races quickly flew to Ye Tian's side, hugged their fists and said, "I've seen His Highness Wanfa!"

These two people are His Royal Highness Jun Jian in the Xuan level region of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race and Yun Zhong Daozi of the Divine Blade Alliance, His Royal Highness Jun Jian knows Ye Tian, naturally knows Ye Tian's name, and also knows that his strength is far inferior to Ye Tian, so he is headed by Ye Tian;

Without knowing much about the Yuangu Palace, they naturally chose to huddle.

"Your Highness Wanfa, do you know anything about the Yuangu Palace?"

His Royal Highness Jun Jian asked.

"I don't know much!" Ye Tian shook his head.

His Royal Highness Jun Jian and Daozi in the clouds were immediately disappointed, and they didn't know much about the Yuan Gu Palace.

Ten thousand races in the universe, there are more than 10,000 god-level powerhouses who have entered here, and the dense god-level powerhouses are gathered in this hall, which is not crowded at all.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian felt an incomparably cold gaze, and the talent of good and evil also felt extremely strong malice.

Swish!

Ye Tian looked over and saw the figure of an acquaintance.

"His Highness the Protoss Tianxuan!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This Heavenly Xuan Highness of the Protoss was an invincible Eternal Ancient Highness when he was at the emperor level, and he was also his opponent, even making him jealous.

It's a pity that since he broke through the Supreme Mountain, he has never taken His Royal Highness Tianxuan in his eyes.

Now, His Royal Highness Tianxuan has also become a god-level, even with the vigorous cultivation of the Protoss, coupled with His Highness Tianxuan's own time talent, he has now recovered to the invincible Eternal Ancient Highness at most, and it is unlikely that he will become a supreme-level Highness.

Moreover, even if His Royal Highness Tianxuan became a Supreme Highness, he was not Ye Tian's opponent, Ye Tian's current strength far exceeded that of His Highness the Supreme Level who had just been promoted, and he did not have a unified standard for what level he had reached.

He has only one evaluation of his combat power - god-level invincibility!

The other side.

Some god-level powerhouses of the Protoss gathered together, and His Highness Tianxuan was also one of them, and these God-level Protoss Highnesses were all headed by His Highness Tianxuan.

"His Royal Highness Tianxuan, it seems that it is His Royal Highness Wanfa of the human race, it is said that His Highness Wanfa is known as the first His Highness of the emperor level, and now he has become a god-level, and his strength is probably not weaker than Your Highness!"

A highness of the Protoss whispered.

"Don't deliberately elevate me, I have to admit that this Wanfa Highness is very strong, and I have a great chance that I am not his opponent! But this is the Yuangu Palace, you can't do anything in this hall, let's go for the first round of testing!"

"Yes!"

A group of god-level highnesses responded.

In the depths of this hall, there is a huge crystal pillar.

This crystal pillar seems to be the pillar of optimus, standing in the depths of the main hall, exuding a faint light and a mysterious aura, which is very extraordinary at first glance.

Many god-level people don't know what this crystal pillar is for, because some god-level people are lucky to get the Yuangu Order, and they don't know anything about the Yuangu Palace.

And some god-level people know the origin of this crystal pillar, and some people even start to tell it.

"This crystal pillar is used to test potential, and I don't know what to test it on. According to the standard of the Yuangu Order, the potential is divided into one star to nine stars, and only the god level who has reached the five-star potential can enter the depths of the Yuangu Order, if the potential is below five stars, then you can only go to some ordinary areas, get some ordinary opportunities, and then you will be sent out of the Yuangu Order. So, testing potential is a very important round. "

A demon god-level said.

Then, someone immediately said: "I am the number one Son of the Universe in the clan, and my potential value must be very high!"

"Hehe, to be able to enter the god level here, which potential is low, but if it is according to the potential standard of the Yuan Gu Palace, it is very difficult to reach more than five stars!

In the midst of the noise, one god after another began to test his potential.

The way to test the potential is very simple, just touch the crystal pillar with your hand, then pour in the power, and wait for the crystal pillar to be tested.

The first test was a child of the universe called the Iron Clan, he stepped forward to test, and soon the crystal pillar emitted a ball of light, and two ancient words appeared.

Ye Tian didn't know this kind of text, but this text contained the laws of heaven and earth, and with a little sense, he knew the meaning it represented.

"Samsung!"

Seeing this three-star evaluation, the son of the ironclad universe was stunned, and immediately yelled: "How can this be, I am a first-grade ordinary level cosmic son, how can I have a three-star evaluation!"

Wow!

The other god-level were also shocked, even the first-grade ordinary level Son of the Universe could only get a three-star evaluation, so wouldn't he want to get an evaluation of more than five stars, maybe the combat power of His Highness of the Constant Ancient level?

Of course, it doesn't have to do with strength, after all, no one knows the specific evaluation criteria for potential.

Next, one by one, a god-level person stepped forward to test, and some people were not as strong as the previous son of the universe of the ironclad clan, but they received a four-star potential evaluation.

Ye Tianyi looked at it intuitively, and analyzed the talent, strength, and potential standards of these people, so as to understand the general evaluation criteria of potential.

Others can't see other people's talent levels, but Ye Tian can.

Therefore, Ye Tian was able to analyze the criteria for potential.

"It has a relationship with the level and quantity of talents, among which the cultivation talent level is the most important, where the cultivation talent level is high, the potential evaluation is not low, but it is also related to strength, and strong strength can improve some potential. "

Ye Tian guessed.

According to this criterion, his potential must be very high.

"Your Highness Jun Jian, go test it!"

Ye Tian said to His Royal Highness Jun Jian beside him.

His Royal Highness Jun Jian nodded and went over to test it.

The test results came out immediately -

"Six stars!"

This evaluation standard is not very high, His Royal Highness Jun Jian is also a Henggu-level Highness, and his cultivation talent is not low, he has reached the Chao level, and he will definitely become a master in the future.

But even so, His Royal Highness Jun Jian only has six-star potential, which shows that the standard division of this potential is too strict.

Subsequently, Yunzhong Daozi also went to test it, but the potential was only five stars, which was not as good as Jun Jianzi.

There are more and more god-level tests, but the Eternal Ancient Highness who is in the first grade has not yet gone to test, and they have all waited until the end.

Suddenly.

A first-grade Eternal Ancient Highness of the Demon Clan went down to test his potential, and the results shocked many god-level people.

"Seven stars!"

This is currently the highest potential star, and the previous highest was only six stars.

Then.

A seven-star potential god-level has appeared, but His Highness Tianxuan of the Protoss and His Highness the Blood Wind of the Demon Race have not yet tested it.

These two are very amazing, when they were at the emperor level, they were the first generation, and now they have entered the god level, and they are still the first generation in their respective races.

His Highness the Blood Wind suddenly spoke: "Your Highness Wanfa, aren't you going to test it?"

Ye Tian said calmly: "You guys test it first!"

His Highness Blood Wind took a look at His Highness Tianxuan, and seeing that His Highness Tianxuan had no intention of testing it immediately, he couldn't help but step forward to test it.

Rumble!!!

The crystal pillar immediately appeared with a potential evaluation star that had never appeared before.

"Eight stars!"

This potential standard is considered to be in line with the reputation of His Highness the Blood Wind, crushing the other first-grade Eternal Rank His Highnesses.

"Your Highness Tianxuan, my potential is eight-star, aren't you going to test it?"

His Highness Bloodwind asked.

"Okay, I'll test it!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan walked over, touched the crystal pillar, and poured power into the crystal pillar.

Wow!

Eight stars!

Like His Highness the Blood Wind, His Highness Tianxuan's potential is also eight stars.
